## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss Attention's content marketing performance and strategy with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant uptick in clicks (135 total, 45 weekly) and impressions (18k weekly) for Attention's content](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Top-performing article: "5 AI tools to automate your follow-up emails" (46 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Content enrichment strategy to be implemented, focusing on visuals, UX, and conversion optimization](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Need for more specific blog template improvements and conversion-focused elements identified](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Total articles: 79 published, 78 indexed](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Best week for clicks: 135 total, 45 weekly (up from 30)](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Impressions increased: 18k weekly (up from 12k)](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Top article: "5 AI tools to automate your follow-up emails" (46 clicks, 3rd best-performing overall)](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Doubling down on successful topics: AI tools, email automation, listicles](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [New topics added (rows 15-35 in content calendar)](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Balancing high search volume keywords with manageable difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Adding keyword ranking data for top 20 articles in performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### Content Enrichment Plan

  - [Starting next week, focusing on best-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Adding visuals: custom images, infographics, screenshots, logos](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Improving intros: hooks, stats, in-brief sections](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Including "Our Take" sections for unique insights](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Enhancing UX and readability](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Implementing conversion panels and CTAs (pending Attention's input)](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### Blog Template Optimization

  - [Need for specific guidance on blog template improvements](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Request for examples of high-converting blog layouts from other companies](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - Potential elements to consider:
      - [Intent pop-ups](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [In-line CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [Exit pop-ups](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [A/B testing different CTA copy and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Additional Content Initiatives

  - [Increasing interlinking efforts (10 more this week)](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Doubling refresh rate from 5 to 10 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [10 articles ready in backend, awaiting images](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

### Traffic Analysis Request

  - [Interest in tracking click origins (IP addresses, regions)](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Exploring options for qualified audience insights](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more information on available tracking capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to start content enrichment process, beginning with top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Provide specific examples and learnings on high-converting blog layouts](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Implement increased interlinking and content refresh strategies](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Investigate and report back on traffic analysis capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Attention to work on conversion panels and CTAs for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up on audience tracking options](https://fathom.video/share/qPVi5G2yo2sPdfqyzH9PT53kXjTg7682?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
